propositions: Three settled verify flags (progressive_drift_refresh, remediation_mode, novelty_drop_active) that default to True should be made always-on by removing their off switches.
Each flag's field and validator should be deleted from VerifyConfig and its 'if not flag: return/None' back-out branch removed with the enabled path hardcoded.
novelty_drop_active has two readers, _maybe_apply_rising_floor in plan review and apply_region_gated_floor in code review, both requiring guard removal.
Retained tuning params remediation_window_minutes, novelty_drop_threshold, and novelty_priority_floor must still parse and drive the drop math.
Config-unreadable fail-safe try/except blocks and self-gates (no-prior-memory, if sign) should be preserved as orthogonal conservative behavior.
False-path tests must be removed or rewritten and default-True assertions dropped across the affected test files.
